mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memory_promotion_job ( user_id, session_id, seq_start_no, seq_end_no, status, attempts, next_attempt_at, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT user_id, id, #{seqStartNo}, #{seqEndNo}, 'pending', 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM chat_session WHERE id = #{sessionId} ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uk_memory_promotion_job_range DO NOTHING
mapper.select: WITH candidate AS ( SELECT id FROM memory_promotion_job WHERE status = 'pending' AND next_attempt_at <= #{now} ORDER BY next_attempt_at, created_at FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 1 ) UPDATE memory_promotion_job job SET status = 'processing', attempts = attempts + 1, processing_started_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now} FROM candidate WHERE job.id = candidate.id RETURNING job.id::text, job.user_id::text, job.session_id, job.seq_start_no, job.seq_end_no, job.status, job.attempts, job.next_attempt_at, job.processing_started_at, job.last_error, job.created_at, job.updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE memory_promotion_job SET status = 'completed', processing_started_at = NULL, last_error = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND status = 'processing'

UPDATE memory_promotion_job SET status = 'pending', next_attempt_at = #{nextAttemptAt}, processing_started_at = NULL, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND status = 'processing'
UPDATE memory_promotion_job SET status = 'failed', processing_started_at = NULL, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND status = 'processing'

UPDATE memory_promotion_job SET status = 'pending', processing_started_at = NULL, next_attempt_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error = 'stale processing claim reclaimed', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE status = 'processing' AND processing_started_at < #{processingStartedBefore}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_promotion_job WHERE status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'failed')
